name: zsnd_snapshot_stop_all_if_playing
description: zSndPlayHandleSnapshot::StopAllIfPlaying walks captured snapshot nodes and stops active backend voices.
known_limits: Superseded by exact binary-safe verification: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare now passes with 0 unmasked mismatches after 8 relocation bytes masked; Binary Ninja body is 134 bytes and the VC object body is 144 bytes with 10 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.

The source keeps the recovered byte-mask list sentinel spelling so VC5 emits the retail branchless compare sequence and self-tests (test dl,dl / test al,al), while result remains in ebx for the backend status bit tests and return value.
The older VC6 /O2 /Oy /Ob0 manifest now fails with 100 unmasked mismatches after the VC5 sentinel improvement and is no longer the closest compiler profile.

Rejected sentinel predicate spellings: plain pointer inequality, testing hasItem directly, explicit byte-self tests, and hasItem & hasItem all preserve behavior but let VC fold or reshape the branchless sentinel idiom, regressing the VC5SP3 byte compare.
